mapper.select: SELECT r.*, s.name AS student_name, s.student_no FROM archive_export_request r LEFT JOIN student s ON r.student_id = s.pk_student WHERE r.pk_request = #{pkRequest}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO archive_export_request (student_id, request_type, reason, status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{requestType}, #{reason}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE archive_export_request SET status = #{status}, audit_user_id = #{auditUserId}, audit_time = NOW(), audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, expire_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 1 THEN DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) ELSE NULL END WHERE pk_request = #{pkRequest}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM archive_export_request WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status = 1 AND expire_time > NOW() ORDER BY expire_time DESC
